  "findings": [
    "Severe pipe strain causing shaft misalignment after piping bolt-up",
    "Failure to perform final alignment check after piping connection",
    "Attempting to grout and install guards before resolving alignment and strain issues"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on grouting and guard installation",
    "Disconnect suction and discharge piping to relieve strain",
    "Measure and correct pipe flange alignment to meet API 686 limits",
    "Re-align the pump and motor shafts and perform a final laser alignment check with piping connected"
  ],
  "rationale": "Connecting the piping introduced significant pipe strain, as evidenced by the visible change in the coupling gap. Aligning the machinery without verifying the alignment after piping connection violates API 686 standards. Grouting the base under these conditions would lock in the strain and misalignment, leading to premature bearing or seal failure during operation.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 6 (Piping Alignment)",
    "API RP 686 Chapter 7 (Shaft Alignment)"
  ]
}
